user.title: Repository Settings
user.description: Configure the git repository for your Home Assistant configuration.

data_description.repo_path: Path to the Home Assistant configuration directory. Usually /config.
data_description.git_user: The name that will appear as the commit author.
data_description.git_email: The email that will appear as the commit author.

data_description.auto_commit: Automatically commit when configuration files change.
data_description.auto_push: Automatically push to the remote repository after each auto-commit. Requires a configured remote.
data_description.auto_pull: Automatically pull new commits from the remote repository when detected. Requires a configured remote.
data_description.commit_interval: Wait this many seconds after the last change before auto-committing. Minimum 30, maximum 86400 (24h).
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the git status for sensor updates. Minimum 10, maximum 3600.
data_description.fetch_interval: How often to fetch from the remote to check for new commits. Minimum 60, maximum 3600.
data_description.ai_commit_messages: Use a configured AI conversation agent to generate descriptive commit messages from the git diff.
data_description.ai_agent_id: The entity ID of the conversation agent to use (e.g., conversation.chatgpt). Leave empty to disable AI commit messages and use auto-generated messages instead.

remote.title: Remote Repository (Optional)
remote.description: Configure a remote repository for push/pull. Leave the URL empty to skip.

data_description.remote_url: The git remote URL (e.g., https://github.com/user/repo.git or git@github.com:user/repo.git).
data_description.auth_method: How to authenticate with the remote.
data_description.auth_token: Personal access token for HTTPS authentication.
data_description.ssh_key_path: Path to the SSH private key file (e.g., /config/.ssh/id_ed25519).

error.path_not_found: The specified path does not exist.
error.git_not_installed: Git is not installed or not found in PATH.
error.invalid_remote_url: Invalid remote URL. Must start with https://, git@, or ssh://.
error.token_required: A personal access token is required for token authentication.
error.ssh_key_not_found: The specified SSH key file does not exist.

abort.already_configured: This configuration path is already configured.

gitignore.title: Edit .gitignore
gitignore.description: Edit the .gitignore file contents. One pattern per line. Changes are applied immediately.

data_description.gitignore_content: Full contents of the .gitignore file. Standard gitignore syntax: one pattern per line, lines starting with # are comments.
